title: time
text: time Uniface data type that holds a sequence of numbers that represent a time, in the format hhnnss . time ParameterName : Direction time VariableSpec Use Use in params and variables blocks to define the data type of a parameter or variable. The data type can be selected when defining fields, global variables, and component variables. Description The $clock ProcScript function can be used to convert data to the time data type. params time pTimeStamp : IN lineartime pElapsedTime : OUT endparams pElapsedTime = $clock-pTimeStamp Copy Related Links Data Handling in ProcScript The ProcScript language enables you to convert data from one type to another, perform arithmetic operations, extract data values, and perform string substitution. Uniface carries out implicit type conversion whenever necessary, for example, when assignments are made between non-matching data types or when comparing non-matching data types. The ProcScript language also provides a number of functions that allow you to convert from one data type to another. Date and Time Data Uniface offers a wide variety of data types for date and time values. Packing Codes for Date and Time Data Uniface data types Date, Time, and Datetime (and linear variations of these) are associated with a variety of packing codes. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
